comment: The dress is great! Very classy and comfortable. It fit perfectly! I'm 5'7" and 130 pounds. I am a 34B chest. This dress would be too long for those who are shorter but could be hemmed. I wouldn't recommend it for those big chested as I am smaller chested and it fit me perfectly.

I loved this dress so much as soon as I tried it on I knew I had to buy it in another color. I am 5'3 about 155lbs and I carry all my weight in my upper body. When I put it on I felt like it thinned me put and I got so many compliments.
I loved this dress so much as soon as I tried it on I knew I had to buy it in another color. I am 5'3 about 155lbs and I carry all my weight in my upper body.
Absolutely love this product! Highly recommend it to everyone.

I'm super happy with these! I've never bought jeans online before and I didn't think they'd even fit, but it turns out they fit pretty perfectly. I got a size 28- I'm 5'6" and weigh about 127 lbs. They are tight but not suffocating.
It's okay. The quality is decent but I expected more for the price.
Perfect fit! Exactly as described. Very happy with the purchase.
A bit disappointed. The color was slightly different from the photos.
Beautiful quality! Very satisfied with this purchase. The material feels premium.
Good product overall. Fits true to size and looks great.
Fantastic blouse! Very elegant and comfortable. I received so many compliments.
Average quality. Material could be better for this price range.
